zh.lifeSummary: 當Syr Dafydd ap Jenkin Jenkin of Llan-arth於大約1440年出生在威爾士格拉莫爾根時，他的父親Jenkin ap Jevan45歲，母親ferch Morgan41歲。他和ferch Owain至少有1個兒子。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Syr Dafydd ap Jenkin Jenkin of Llan-arth于大约1440年出生在威尔士格拉莫爾根时，他的父亲Jenkin ap Jevan45岁，母亲ferch Morgan41岁。他和ferch Owain至少有1个儿子。

nameMeanings.name: Jenkin
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal names Jankin, Jenkin, and Jonkin, pet forms of Jan, Jen, and Jon + the hypocoristic suffix -kin. In Middle English, names in -kin were often used to name the younger of two family members with the same personal name.

variants.name: Jenkins
meanings: English and Welsh: variant of Jenkin , with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s. Jenkins is one of the most common surnames in England, especially southwestern England, but is also especially associated with Wales.

variants.name: Jenks
meanings: English (West Midlands): from the Middle English personal name Jenke (a shortening of the personal name Jenkin, Jankin; see Jenkin ), with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s.

History: Joseph Jenks (1602–83), the descendant of an old Welsh family, was born in England and traveled to Saugus, near Lynn, MA, in 1642 to assist in the development of America's first iron works. His son, Joseph Jenckes (sic), followed in 1650, founded Pawtucket, RI, and raised four sons who held places of respect and distinction in RI, including one who served as governor for five years.

variants.name: Jenkinson
meanings: English (Yorkshire and Lancashire): from the Middle English personal names Jankin, Jenkin, or Jonkin (see Jenkin ) + son.

nameMeanings.name: Dafydd
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: equivalent of David . In widespread use during the Middle Ages, it was later largely replaced by the English form, but since the late 19th century it has come into its own again.

nameMeanings.name: ap
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

nameMeanings.name: Jenkin
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Transferred use of the surname, which is derived from the medieval given name Jankin. This was a pet form of the boy's name Jan , with the diminutive suffix -kin. The modern given name is popular in Wales, where the surnames Jenkin and Jenkins are common.

en.lifeSummary: When Syr Dafydd ap Jenkin Jenkin of Llan-arth was born about 1440, in Glamorgan, Wales, his father, Jenkin ap Jevan, was 45 and his mother, ferch Morgan, was 41. He had at least 1 son with ferch Owain.

fr.Trecastle, Brckns, Wls: Trecastle, Flintshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Syr Dafydd ap Jenkin Jenkin of Llan-arth est né environ 1440, à Glamorgan, Galles, son père, Jenkin ap Jevan, avait 45 ans et sa mère, ferch Morgan, avait 41 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils avec ferch Owain.

de.lifeSummary: Als Syr Dafydd ap Jenkin Jenkin of Llan-arth um 1440 in Glamorgan, Wales geboren wurde, war sein Vater Jenkin ap Jevan 45 und seine Mutter ferch Morgan 41. Er hatte mit ferch Owain mindestens 1 Sohn.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Syr Dafydd ap Jenkin Jenkin of Llan-arth è nato il circa 1440 nel Glamorgan, Galles, il suo padre, Jenkin ap Jevan, aveva 45 anni e il suo madre, ferch Morgan, aveva 41 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio con ferch Owain.

ja.lifeSummary: Syr Dafydd ap Jenkin Jenkin of Llan-arthが約1440年にウェールズグラモーガンで生まれた時，父Jenkin ap Jevanは45歳，母ferch Morganは41歳であった。彼はferch Owainとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。

ko.lifeSummary: Syr Dafydd ap Jenkin Jenkin of Llan-arth(이)가 대략 1440년 웨일스 글램르건에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Jenkin ap Jevan(은)는 45세였고, 그의 어머니 ferch Morgan(은)는 41세였다. 그는 ferch Owain(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Syr Dafydd ap Jenkin Jenkin of Llan-arth nasceu aproximadamente 1440, em Glamorgan, Gales, seu pai, Jenkin ap Jevan, tinha 45 anos e sua mãe, ferch Morgan, tinha 41 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho com ferch Owain.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Syr Dafydd ap Jenkin Jenkin of Llan-arth родился около 1440 г. в местности глэморган, Уэльс, его отцу по имени Jenkin ap Jevan было 45 лет, а матери, которую звали ferch Morgan, 41. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын от ferch Owain.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Syr Dafydd ap Jenkin Jenkin of Llan-arth nació aproximadamente 1440, en Glamorgan, Gales, su papá, Jenkin ap Jevan, tenía 45 años y su mamá, ferch Morgan, tenía 41 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo con ferch Owain.
